arts.ttl: Portsmouth's Championship relegation rivals 'make big decision' on new manager amid links to ex-Sheffield United & Leicester City men
arts.sum: Hull City are the latest Championship club to part ways with their manager.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth boss has say on title-winning Swansea loanee after mixed reviews for former Chelsea starlet
arts.sum: John Mousinho promised Pompey will be wary of Myles Peart-Harris’s threat amid mixed Swansea reviews.

arts.ttl: Swansea v Portsmouth injury news as nine outs and three doubts
arts.sum: Pompey travel to Swansea City today hoping to make it third time lucky.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth’s telling Championship relegation chances revealed as Opta supercomputer reveals QPR, Cardiff City and Sheffield Wednesday changes
arts.sum: Portsmouth travel to Swansea City in a crucial Championship showdown this weekend

arts.ttl: Portsmouth boss’ verdict on latest Yengi injury blow as details over setback emerge
arts.sum: John Mousinho aired his angst at Kusini Yengi’s latest injury setback arriving on international duty with Australia.

arts.ttl: Swansea City injury bulletin as huge double boost received and news on duo emerges
arts.sum: Fellow forwards Sam Parker (hamstring) and Josh Ginnelly (Achilles) are similarly making progress, but Williams says they're both still some way off a return. Swansea City boss Luke Williams says Eom Jisung is back in first-team contention ahead of Saturday's visit of Portsmouth.

arts.ttl: FA Cup third-round draw details as Portsmouth, Cardiff, Hull & Co set to learn opponents amid Championship relegation struggles
arts.sum: The FA Cup hasn’t been on the Pompey agenda so far during the 2024-25 season.

arts.ttl: Swansea City, Huddersfield Town keen on League Two star, report claims
arts.sum: Swansea City and Huddersfield Town are both interested in Fleetwood Town goalkeeper David Harrington, Football Insider has claimed.… The post Swansea City, Huddersfield Town keen on League Two star, report claims appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: 'It's as simple as that' - two additional frustrations identified after Portsmouth games against Blackburn and Millwall are cancelled
arts.sum: Pompey have endured a frustrating week off the pitch following the late cancellations of their games against Blackburn and Millwall.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth v Swansea City: Jordan Cross' predicted line-up with one key change
arts.sum: Pompey are set to return to action tomorrow after their three-week Championship lay-off.
